organization.business_model: Provides consulting, project management, and compliance services to mid-market enterprises across healthcare, finance, and government sectors.

governance_and_policy.policy_enforcement: Informal, with occasional audits conducted by external consultants during quarterly reviews.

stakeholders.name: Margaret H. Ellison
stakeholders.signature_quote: We can't afford to be seen as the firm that failed a compliance audit.

stakeholders.name: Daniel K. Tran
likely_pushback: Prioritizing short-term cost savings over long-term security
stakeholders.signature_quote: If it's not breaking the bank, I don't care about the risk.

stakeholders.name: Rajiv S. Patel
stakeholders.signature_quote: We're patching the same vulnerabilities from 2018. It's time to modernize.

stakeholders.name: Sophia N. Kim
stakeholders.signature_quote: If we break things during implementation, the clients will blame us.

stakeholders.name: Ethan J. Wallace
stakeholders.signature_quote: I'm not here to police employees' passwords.

stakeholders.name: Clara R. Hayes
concerns: Sales cycle delays from security reviews
stakeholders.signature_quote: Clients don't care about our security until it's on the news.

stakeholders.name: Marcus T. O'Connor
stakeholders.signature_quote: Losing our license would be the end of this company.
